commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=05fec76fd17500a205e40f444647c2cecb1fde64)
commands.review_summary:
The PR expands `localModelLean` to trim managed web/search tools, suppress native OpenAI/Codex web search unless web tools are preserved, and updates docs plus focused tests around that behavior.

PR surface: Source +154, Tests +214, Docs 0. Total +368 across 20 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the changed behavior from source: current main trims only `browser`, `cron`, and `message`, while PR head adds web/search tools and native-search suppression. I did not run a live local-model reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This maintainer-labeled PR needs a human compatibility/API decision; it should not be auto-closed or replaced by an automated fix lane.

target.title: fix(agents): trim web tools in lean mode
target.body:
## Summary

- extend `localModelLean` so it trims `web_search`, `web_fetch`, and `x_search` along with `browser`, `cron`, and `message`
- keep explicit override behavior for exact, grouped, and wildcard web preserves (`group:web`, `web_*`) while suppressing native OpenAI/Codex web-search injection unless the run preserves web tools
- update local-model docs so the experimental lean-mode contract matches the runtime behavior

Refs https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599.

## Verification

- Rebasing onto current `origin/main` completed on head `05fec76fd17`.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts src/agents/codex-native-web-search.test.ts src/llm/providers/stream-wrappers/openai.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-stream.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner-extraparams.test.ts extensions/openai/openai-provider.test.ts --reporter=dot`: passed, 4 shards / 230 tests.
- `node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md`: passed.
- `node scripts/docs-list.js >/tmp/openclaw-docs-list-88884.txt`: passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md extensions/openai/native-web-search.ts extensions/openai/openai-provider.test.ts extensions/openai/shared.ts src/agents/agent-tools.ts src/agents/codex-native-web-search-core.ts src/agents/codex-native-web-search.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner-extraparams.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/extra-params.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/llm/providers/stream-wrappers/openai.test.ts src/llm/providers/stream-wrappers/openai.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-stream.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-stream.ts src/plugins/types.ts`: passed.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts extensions/openai/native-web-search.ts extensions/openai/openai-provider.test.ts extensions/openai/shared.ts src/agents/agent-tools.ts src/agents/codex-native-web-search-core.ts src/agents/codex-native-web-search.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner-extraparams.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/extra-params.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/llm/providers/stream-wrappers/openai.test.ts src/llm/providers/stream-wrappers/openai.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-stream.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-stream.ts src/plugins/types.ts`: passed.
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`: passed.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`: clean, no accepted/actionable findings.
- AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed && pnpm build`: passed, `provider=aws`, `lease=cbx_c0402141cc16`, `run=run_0d97f1e0b7c3`, exit 0; selected lanes `core`, `coreTests`, `extensions`, `extensionTests`, `docs`, then completed `build-all`.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: `localModelLean` now removes managed web search/fetch/social search tools and prevents provider-native OpenAI/Codex `web_search` injection unless web tools are explicitly preserved.

Real environment tested: linked OpenClaw gwt worktree with symlinked `node_modules`; AWS Crabbox Linux changed-gate and build proof.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: targeted Vitest for lean filtering, provider-policy integration, Codex native web-search activation, OpenAI wrapper payload behavior, provider stream-family propagation, embedded extra-param wrapper behavior, and bundled OpenAI plugin behavior; docs MDX/list checks; formatter/lint checks; whitespace diff check; autoreview branch review; `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --label local-model-lean-web-tools-check-build --shell -- "pnpm check:changed && pnpm build"`.

Evidence after fix: the targeted Vitest run passed 7 files across 4 shards, 230 tests total. It proves lean mode keeps `read`/`exec`, drops `web_search`/`web_fetch`/`x_search`/`browser`/`cron`/`message`, preserves web tools via `group:web` and `web_*`, and suppresses managed, Codex-native, and direct OpenAI-native web search when lean mode trims web tools. AWS Crabbox selected core, core test, extension, extension test, and docs lanes, then completed build-all.

Observed result after fix: lean-mode docs and runtime now agree that weaker local-model setups get a smaller web/browser/scheduling/message tool surface across managed and native search representations while explicit web-tool preserves remain available.

What was not tested: live Ollama model-family validation for the broader local-model issue.
target.author: vincentkoc
